UpdateSourceArgs:
-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Set-Location '{{%FullBaseDir%}}'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force 'BepInEx\plugins' | Out-Null; $tmp=New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force ([IO.Path]::Combine([IO.Path]::GetTempPath(),'dspnebula')); Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://thunderstore.io/package/download/xiaoye97/BepInEx/5.4.17/' -OutFile ($tmp.FullName + ' epinex.zip'); Expand-Archive -Force ($tmp.FullName + ' epinex.zip') ($tmp.FullName + ' epinex'); $src=$tmp.FullName + ' epinex\BepInExPack'; if (!(Test-Path $src)) { $src=$tmp.FullName + ' epinex' }; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ($src + '\*') .; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://thunderstore.io/package/download/nebula/NebulaMultiplayerModApi/2.1.0/' -OutFile ($tmp.FullName + '\api.zip'); Expand-Archive -Force ($tmp.FullName + '\api.zip') ($tmp.FullName + '\api'); Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ($tmp.FullName + '\api\plugins\*') 'BepInEx\plugins'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://thunderstore.io/package/download/nebula/NebulaMultiplayerMod/0.9.16/' -OutFile ($tmp.FullName + '
ebula.zip'); Expand-Archive -Force ($tmp.FullName + '
ebula.zip') ($tmp.FullName + '
ebula'); Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ($tmp.FullName + '
ebula\plugins\*') 'BepInEx\plugins'; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp.FullName"
